title: LumaScope Generated Infrastructure State
description: Account-specific identifiers written by the bootstrap script. This file is gitignored and never committed.

account_id.description: Cloudflare account ID for the target account

account_email.description: Email associated with the Cloudflare account

bootstrap_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when bootstrap was last run

wrangler_version.description: Version of wrangler used during bootstrap

worker_id.description: Cloudflare Worker ID (UUID) for this environment

worker_name.description: Cloudflare Worker name for this environment

d1_database_id.description: D1 database UUID for this environment

d1_database_name.description: D1 database name for this environment
